name: Side Car
recipeInstructions:
Recipe by: Joe Robertson
Preparation Time: 0:07
1. Pour granulated sugar on a small plate.
2. Rub the rim of a cocktail glass with the lime wedge and dip the rim of the glass in the sugar until it is coated with a frosting of sugar.
3. Fill the cocktail glass with ice cubes.
4. Fill a mixing glass with cracked ice.
5. Add the brandy, triple sec, lime juice, egg white, and powdered sugar to the mixing glass.
6. Shake and strain into the cocktail glass.
7. Garnish with the lime wedge.
